tax.title: Tax Breakdown
tax.note: Your actual electricity bill includes additional fixed costs not shown here: network delivery (~5-10 ct/kWh) and supplier margin (~1-2 ct/kWh). This breakdown shows only the hour-variable energy commodity price.

settings.api_key_hint_registered: Account actief. GO/WAIT/AVOID actions en tomorrow preview zijn ontgrendeld voor HA automations.
settings.api_key_hint_anonymous: Register a free Synctacles account at synctacles.com and paste your API key here to use GO/WAIT/AVOID actions and tomorrow prices in HA automations.
settings.energy_plan_hint: Select your country and energy plan.
settings.enever_token_active: Token active — select your supplier above.
settings.enever_token_hint: Enter an Enever API key to unlock 24 supplier-specific price plans. Free key via enever.nl (max 250 calls/month, app uses ~3/day).
settings.bidding_zone_hint: e.g. NL, DE-LU, BE, FR, NO1, SE3, DK1, FI, ES, PT, AT
settings.best_window_hint: Duration of the cheapest contiguous window (1-8 hours, default 3)
settings.power_sensor_hint: HA entity for live cost (auto-detected if empty)
settings.saved: Saved! Restart app for source changes to take effect.
settings.save_error: Could not save settings. Please check your configuration and try again.
